purpose: Long-lived design and release contract for independent native 501x256 gprMax pilot families.

pair_contract.shared_geometry_requirement: Positive full/control inputs must share domain, grid, PML, source, receiver, scan steps and upper-layer geometry; only basal contrast may differ.
pair_contract.visible_phase_label: Only signed full-minus-no-basal contrast after successful solver and postprocess validation.
pair_contract.geometric_reference: Audit prior only; never curve supervision.

required_before_promotion: paired-output hash and signed visible-phase audit

release_gates: static geometry and sampling validation passes
target mask comes from signed matched-pair contrast
negative masks are confirmed zero from a true target-absent design
each scene family is split as an indivisible group
no output is formal-training eligible without explicit human promotion
